subject: fix(docs): correct stale counts and wrong library name across documentation
body:
README, CLAUDE.md, USER_GUIDE.md, and HISTORY.md all had inaccurate numbers
and library references that drifted from the actual code:
- PDF library: jsPDF → pdf-lib (replaced months ago, docs never updated)
- Platform formats: 28 → 27 (actual count in platforms.js)
- Overlay effects: 34 → 26 (actual count in layouts.js)
- Layout presets: 35 → 27 (actual count in layoutPresets.js)

Tags: docs, accuracy, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-accuracy
Semver: patch

title: correct stale counts and wrong library name across documentation
